title: suggenes #4773
definition:
1) of the same kin, akin to, related by blood
 2) in a wider sense, of the same nation, a fellow countryman
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) of the same kin, akin to, related by blood
 2) in a wider sense, of the same nation, a fellow countryman

    NASB:  congenital, hence akin to, subst. a kinsman, relative:
